description_long: This is a polygonal wooden barrel with a classic cylindrical shape, slightly bulging at the center and tapering towards the top and bottom. The body is constructed from brown staves, held together by three prominent gray bands or hoops that encircle the barrel at the top, middle, and bottom. The top opening is visible and uncovered, suggesting the barrel is hollow and can be used for storage or transport of goods. The surface appears matte and unpolished, with flat facets giving it a stylized, low-poly look. There are no visible handles, markings, or labels on the exterior, and the overall design is simple and utilitarian, suitable for urban or rustic settings.
description: A stylized, brown wooden barrel with three gray reinforcement bands and an open top, featuring a simple, low-poly design.
description_view_0: Front view of the barrel showing the open top, brown staves, and three gray bands encircling the body.
description_view_1: Side view with the same features as the front, highlighting the symmetrical bulge and band placement.
description_view_2: Rear view, visually identical to the front, with the open top and three gray bands clearly visible.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the open top and the evenly spaced gray bands.
attribute_banding_or_reinforcement: gray metal hoops at top, middle, and bottom
